candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line representing top-line sales; best match for REVT.
Represents ancillary operating revenues, not total revenue; less appropriate than explicit Total Revenue.
Technical balancing line, not an economic revenue measure; should not be used when explicit Total Revenue exists.
Direct production cost on income statement; canonical COGS line.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period expense; not appropriate for COGS.
Net PPE balance, not an expense; inappropriate for COGS.
Accumulated depreciation, not current-period COGS.
Gross PPE cost, not period expense; not COGS.

variables.notes: There are two 'Cost of goods sold' rows in the preview but with same label; selecting by label is sufficient per instructions.

candidates.why: This is revenue, not an operating expense; should not be included in SG&A.
Classic SG&A component representing personnel/overhead costs.
Bucket of operating overhead costs; fits SG&A definition when no explicit SG&A total is given.
Additional bucket of other operating overhead expenses; also SG&A-type costs.
Likely represents share-based compensation related depreciation; typically treated as part of SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total line; thus multiple overhead components are selected as per hierarchy.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D line on income statement; canonical choice for XRD even if amounts are currently nan in preview.
Net finance cost but less preferred when a specific interest expense line is available.
Dedicated interest expense line capturing gross interest cost; best match for XINT.
Subset of interest expenses; not the primary overall interest expense measure.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities only; component of total interest, but narrower than full interest expenses.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of previously held equity interest
candidates.why: Fair value remeasurement gain, not interest; not appropriate for XINT.
Intercompany interest; unclear if material share of total interest; separate from main interest expenses.
Portion of profit attributable to minority shareholders; not an interest expense.
Duplicate of non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Generic label but appears unused (all nan) and a duplicate concept; 'Interest Expenses' with values is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; component only, not total interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest cost.
Debt balance, not expense.
Accrued but unpaid interest liability; balance sheet item, not full-period expense.
Accrued interest liability; balance sheet, not full expense.
Long-term debt balance, not interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority interests; not interest expense.
Minority equity; not interest expense.

variables.notes: Chosen over 'Net interest expenses' to capture gross interest cost as requested.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of previously held equity interest
candidates.why: One-off remeasurement gain in P&L; not a stock equity balance.
Share of profit in affiliates; income statement item, not total book equity.
Component of equity (contributed capital) but not total equity.
Subcomponent of paid-in equity; too narrow for BE.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ (common) equity; best proxy for book equity for PROF.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; slightly broader than shareholders’ equity but also a valid equity total.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Using equity attributable to shareholders (common equity) as book equity measure.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minorities; flow item, not stock, but valid representation of minority interest in P&L context.
Duplicate of non-controlling interests on income statement; represents same flow.
Balance sheet stock of minority equity; good candidate for MIB.
Explicit balance sheet line for minority interests; canonical stock measure of MIB.

variables.notes: Chose the balance sheet stock measure of minority interest as MIB.
